---
status: public
shortDescription: "An object referred to by a const variable is an immutable object"
shortCorrection: "An object referred to by a const variable can be a mutable object"
concepts:
  - Mutability
  - Reference
related:
inOtherPl:
 - pl: Java
   id: FinalReferenceImpliesImmutability
spec:

    sections: ["13.3.1"]
plVersion:

---

If a const variable refers to an object, that object is immutable.

frontmatter.shortDescription: An object referred to by a const variable is an immutable object
frontmatter.shortCorrection: An object referred to by a const variable can be a mutable object
